title: Adopt Renovate org wide

tasks.title: Add shared Renovate preset + security-gates renovate.json (native)
tasks.verification: Added default.json (shared org preset: config:recommended + pinGitHubActionDigests + docker:pinDigests, minimumReleaseAge 7d null'd for lockFileMaintenance/pin/replacement, platformAutomerge, lockFileMaintenance, vulnerabilityAlerts, dev-deps grouping, packageRules automerge dev/patch-minor + actions/docker digests + lockfile-maint only, never major/prod last-match-wins) + renovate.json (extends local>Sharper-Flow/sharperflow-security-gates + github-actions grouping). renovate-config-validator: both files 'Config validated successfully'. No stray bunx artifacts.

tasks.title: Renovate App install + allow_auto_merge + onboarding (privileged; handoff where no scope)
tasks.verification: allow_auto_merge enabled on PokeEdge, PokeEdge-Web, sharperflow-security-gates (gh api, repo-admin). pokeedge #283 + web #100 auto-merge armed. Renovate App NOT installed (gh api installations: no renovate) — App install is org-owner-only (GitHub Apps not installable via user PAT; same limit confirmed with Sonar). RUNBOOK handed off: org owner installs https://github.com/apps/renovate on Sharper-Flow (All or the 4 repos), confirm private-repo pricing, merge each onboarding PR; ensure security-gates main requires self-test for its automerge; keep advance automerge deferred until conformAdvanceCi. AC3 settings done; AC4 = documented handoff.

tasks.title: Document the Renovate dependency-update policy in ci-standard.md
tasks.verification: ci-standard.md: added '## Dependency updates (Renovate)' (shared preset, 7d cooldown security-exempt, automerge gated on required check + scoped to dev/patch-minor+digests+lockfile-maint never major/prod, one-updater rule, install). Replaced stale 'Dependabot maintains both' (pin policy) → Renovate; 'keeps Dependabot auto-merge clean' → Renovate; checklist 'Dependabot github-actions enabled' → 'Renovate enabled (extends org preset)'. README pin-policy line → Renovate. Remaining Dependabot mentions are the intentional 'not Dependabot / remove dependabot.yml' policy.

tasks.title: Per-repo renovate.json (pokeedge, web, advance) — cross-project PRs
tasks.verification: Per-repo renovate.json PRs created: pokeedge #283, pokeedge-web #100, advance #146 — each extends github>Sharper-Flow/sharperflow-security-gates (advance + pnpm-subpackage grouping). JSON valid. Takes effect once preset is on security-gates default branch + Renovate App installed. (Cross-project PRs; no native change.)

tasks.title: Remove pokeedge dependabot.yml after Renovate onboarding (PR)
tasks.verification: pokeedge .github/dependabot.yml already absent (gh api 404 + .github listing + code search empty). AC5 satisfied; no removal PR needed. No native file change.

tasks.title: Verify Renovate adoption
tasks.verification: All 4 repos verified on default branch: renovate.json extends the org preset (security-gates self via local>, pokeedge/web/advance via github>). default.json + renovate.json validate (renovate-config-validator: 'Config validated successfully against 2 files'). automerge policy live: preset automerge:true; advance overrides automerge:false. allow_auto_merge: pokeedge/web/security-gates true, advance false (double-guarded). Required gates confirmed via org ruleset 'Sharperflow App Protection' (required check 'Sharperflow CI Gate' = full functional suite on pokeedge/web). Renovate App installed (pokeedge dependency-dashboard live). pokeedge dependabot.yml absent (one updater).

subagent_reports.topic: Renovate org-wide config validation (shared preset, cooldown, automerge-gated-on-check, managers for uv/bun/pnpm/actions/docker, App install, Dependabot coexistence)

sources.label: Config Presets (GitHub-hosted, extends syntax, filenames)
sources.summary: github>owner/repo and github>owner/repo:presetName syntax; preset repo holds default.json / <name>.json at root or path; can extend from org .github repo via local>org/.github:renovate-config.

sources.label: PEP 621 manager (uv/uv.lock)
sources.summary: uv is NOT a standalone manager — pep621 manager updates pyproject.toml AND supports lockFileMaintenance for uv.lock (and pdm.lock); supports uv workspaces, tool.uv.dev-dependencies, tool.uv.sources. No /modules/manager/uv/ page exists (404).

sources.label: Bun manager (bun.lock)
sources.summary: bun manager matches package.json + bun.lockb? ; lockFileMaintenance supports bun.lock and bun.lockb; when bun lock present the package.json is excluded from npm manager.

sources.label: npm manager (pnpm-lock.yaml, subdirs, workspaces)
sources.summary: pnpm handled by npm manager (category js); matches (^|/)package.json, (^|/)pnpm-workspace.yaml anywhere (recursive subdir auto-detect); lockFileMaintenance supports pnpm-lock.yaml; supports pnpm.overrides + pnpm catalogs.

sources.label: GitHub Actions digest pinning preset
sources.summary: helpers:pinGitHubActionDigests pins actions to commit SHA and keeps them updated; presets-helpers shows pinning + SemVer comment retention.

sources.label: Minimum Release Age (cooldown) key concept
sources.summary: minimumReleaseAge (formerly stabilityDays). String duration e.g. '3 days'/'7 days'. Adds renovate/stability-days status check. Per separate version. internalChecksFilter defaults strict.

sources.label: minimumReleaseAge config option detail
sources.summary: With automerge + minimumReleaseAge, Renovate creates PR immediately but only automerges after the duration passes. 0 days == null (>=42.19.5). lockFileMaintenance/replacement/pin not validated for release age (set null there per security preset).

sources.label: vulnerabilityAlerts (security exempt from cooldown)
sources.summary: vulnerabilityAlerts default config sets minimumReleaseAge:null, prCreation:immediate, commitMessageSuffix:[SECURITY]; security PRs 'skip the line' (ignore schedule/limits). So security fixes are NOT delayed by cooldown.

sources.label: Automerge key concept (waits for required checks)
sources.summary: 'Renovate will wait for the required tests to pass before it automerges.' By default uses platformAutomerge (GitHub native auto-merge) which respects branch protection / required status checks. Required PR reviews/CODEOWNERS can block automerge.

sources.label: config:best-practices preset components
sources.summary: config:best-practices extends config:recommended + docker:pinDigests + helpers:pinGitHubActionDigests + :configMigration + :pinDevDependencies + abandonments:recommended + security:minimumReleaseAgeNpm + :maintainLockFilesWeekly.

sources.label: Security presets (minimumReleaseAge npm pattern)
sources.summary: security:minimumReleaseAgeNpm sets minimumReleaseAge '3 days' for npm with internalChecksFilter strict, and nulls it for lockFileMaintenance/replacement/pin update types.

sources.label: Installing & Onboarding (GitHub App)
sources.summary: Install Mend Renovate App at github.com/apps/renovate; choose All or Selected repos (org-admin); first run opens a 'Configure Renovate' onboarding PR; no changes until that PR is merged; config file renovate.json / .github/renovate.json / .renovaterc.json / json5 variants.

sources.label: Dependabot coexistence (maintainer answer)
sources.summary: Renovate maintainer secustor: 'Renovate ignores Dependabot PRs; if you don't want their PRs anymore you simply delete .github/dependabot.yml.' Running both = duplicate PRs; recommended pattern is pick one.

sources.label: matchManagers / matchFileNames (subdir scoping)
sources.summary: packageRules.matchManagers restricts a rule to a manager (e.g. github-actions, npm, pep621, bun); matchFileNames matches package/lock files by full path for subdir-scoped rules.

sources.label: semanticCommits
sources.summary: semanticCommits 'auto' (default) autodetects conventional commits and follows suit; set 'enabled' to force; semanticCommitType/semanticCommitScope customizable.

subagent_reports.architecture_assessment: All seven research questions resolve to CONFIRMED against authoritative docs.renovatebot.com (docs build 43.214.2). The requested architecture (one shared org preset extended by all repos; cooldown via minimumReleaseAge security-exempt; automerge gated on the 'Sharperflow CI Gate' required status check; no automerge of majors or prod deps; grouping + semantic commits) maps cleanly onto by-the-book Renovate and is the boring, supported path. KEY CORRECTIONS vs the proposal's assumptions: (1) There is NO standalone 'uv' manager — uv.lock is updated by the pep621 manager's lockFileMaintenance (pyproject.toml drives version bumps; uv.lock refreshed). (2) pnpm is handled by the npm manager, and Renovate auto-detects package.json/pnpm-lock.yaml in ANY subdir (plugin/, acp-mux/) with zero extra config — the (^|/) file-match regex is recursive; matchFileNames is only needed to scope RULES to a subdir, not to enable detection. (3) Automerge correctness with the required check is structural, not a Renovate setting: Renovate's platformAutomerge uses GitHub-native auto-merge, which by design will not merge until branch-protection required status checks (the 'Sharperflow CI Gate') pass. The gate must be configured as a REQUIRED status check in each repo's branch protection; that is the enforcement mechanism, Renovate just enqueues. (4) Cooldown does not delay security fixes: vulnerabilityAlerts defaults minimumReleaseAge:null and prCreation:immediate ('skip the line'). (5) For lockFileMaintenance / pin / replacement, minimumReleaseAge cannot be validated (package manager performs the install), so the security preset nulls it there — mirror that. Simplicity note: extending config:best-practices gives docker:pinDigests + helpers:pinGitHubActionDigests + :pinDevDependencies + weekly lockfile maintenance + npm minimum-release-age out of the box, but it ONLY ships security:minimumReleaseAgeNpm (npm-scoped). For org-wide cooldown across pypi/docker/etc you must add explicit minimumReleaseAge packageRules (not datasource-limited) in the shared preset.

validation.notes: No anti-patterns. Two operational gotchas to design around (not blockers): (a) automerge depends on the 'Sharperflow CI Gate' being set as a REQUIRED check in branch protection in every repo — without that, GitHub native auto-merge has nothing to wait on and could merge early; (b) the security-gates preset repo itself must have Renovate installed/onboarded for ITS pins to be bumped — hosting a preset does NOT require Renovate, but you want it there anyway since the proposal wants its SHA pins auto-bumped.

subagent_reports.recommendation: Adopt a single shared preset at the repo root of Sharper-Flow/sharperflow-security-gates as default.json (referenced by every repo via extends: ['github>Sharper-Flow/sharperflow-security-gates']). Put cross-ecosystem cooldown (minimumReleaseAge '7 days' org default, internalChecksFilter strict, nulled for lockFileMaintenance/pin/replacement), grouping (group dev deps + non-major), semanticCommits:'auto', helpers:pinGitHubActionDigests + docker:pinDigests, and the automerge policy (automerge true ONLY for matchUpdateTypes patch/minor on devDependencies + lockFileMaintenance + github-actions/docker digests; explicitly automerge:false for major and for production dependencies) in that shared preset. Keep enforcement structural: require 'Sharperflow CI Gate' in branch protection on each repo and rely on platformAutomerge. Per-repo renovate.json files just extend the preset; no per-ecosystem manager config is needed (uv via pep621, bun via bun manager, pnpm subdirs via npm manager are all auto-detected). Retire Dependabot by deleting pokeedge's .github/dependabot.yml after Renovate onboarding is merged (Renovate already ignores Dependabot PRs). Concrete JSON for the shared preset + 4 per-repo snippets are in the final response.
follow_ups: Confirm the exact GitHub org/repo casing: docs syntax is github>Owner/repo — verify it is 'Sharper-Flow/sharperflow-security-gates' (case-sensitive in extends).

Decide cooldown value: 3 days (npm-unpublish-window, docs example) vs 7 days (stronger supply-chain delay). Proposal allows 3-7; recommend 7 as org default with a shorter override only if PR latency hurts.

Verify whether the org wants config:best-practices as a base (opinionated: weekly lockfile maintenance, pinDevDependencies, npm-only minimumReleaseAge) or a hand-rolled extends:['config:recommended'] base for tighter control. Recommend config:recommended + explicit rules for predictability.
branch protection: ensure 'Sharperflow CI Gate' is the EXACT required check context name in each repo, and enable 'Allow auto-merge' in repo settings (required for platformAutomerge).
If Renovate is NOT given a bypass for required PR reviews / CODEOWNERS on a repo, automerge will stall — confirm review requirements per repo or use the renovate-approve helper apps.

wisdom.content: Automerge policy amended mid-execution (user decision, supersedes AC1/DONT2 "never automerge major/prod"). New policy: preset sets top-level automerge:true → ALL update types (incl. majors + production deps) auto-merge once the repo's required check is green. Justification: pokeedge+web require Sharperflow CI Gate = a real functional suite (unit+integration(pgvector)+e2e(playwright)+contract), and Renovate only merges GREEN — a breaking update fails the suite, the PR stays open red, and never merges. The human review being removed was low-value (user would never perform it). 7-day cooldown (minimumReleaseAge) retained; security fixes exempted via vulnerabilityAlerts.minimumReleaseAge "0 days". advance is the exception: no Sharperflow CI Gate yet (deferred until conformAdvanceCi) → its renovate.json sets automerge:false + repo allow_auto_merge stays off (double guard). An LLM merge-reviewer was considered and deferred to a separate change: the test suite is the load-bearing gate; an agent adds only marginal changelog/deprecation signal, not safety.

proposal.approval_evidence: User approved. Renovate org-wide via shared preset in security-gates; cooldown (minimumReleaseAge) in Renovate; automerge gated on Sharperflow CI Gate; majors/prod→PR; retire pokeedge Dependabot; App install = org-admin handoff. Cooldown scope moves here from enforceLifecycleScriptBlocking.

discovery.approval_evidence: Agreement approved; contract minted (14 items). Renovate config validated vs docs: shared default.json preset, pep621/bun/npm(pnpm-subdir)/github-actions/docker managers, minimumReleaseAge 7d security-exempt, platformAutomerge waits for required checks (structural via branch protection), packageRules automerge dev-deps/patch-minor + digests + lockfile-maintenance only, never major/prod. Dependabot delete after onboarding. Open: Mend private pricing (confirm at install); advance automerge deferred until conformAdvanceCi.

design.approval_evidence: Design: concrete shared default.json preset (cooldown 7d security-exempt, platformAutomerge, automerge dev/patch-minor+digests+lockfile-maint only, never major/prod last-match-wins), per-repo renovate.json ×4 (subdirs auto-detected), branch-protection allow_auto_merge + required-check gating per repo (advance deferred until conformAdvanceCi), App install runbook (org-admin handoff), Dependabot removal post-onboarding, ci-standard doc. Routing: native preset/doc + cross-project PRs + privileged App/settings. Config validation via bunx renovate-config-validator (no npm). Research VALIDATED externally; no separate validator. No CONFLICT.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved 6-task prep contract. T1 preset+sg config, T2 docs, T3 per-repo PRs, T4 privileged App-install (handoff), T5 dependabot removal, T6 verify. Config/docs/PRs done here; App-install + onboarding + Dependabot-removal complete after org-owner installs Renovate.

execution.approval_evidence: All 6 tasks done. Preset (automerge-all-on-green, security-exempt cooldown) + security-gates renovate.json on main (PR #7, #8). Per-repo renovate.json merged: pokeedge #283, web #100, advance #146 (automerge:false). pokeedge dependabot absent (one updater). ci-standard.md + README updated. Policy amended mid-execution per user decision (supersedes AC1/DONT2 conservative automerge → automerge all on green; rationale: Sharperflow CI Gate = real functional suite, Renovate only merges green). allow_auto_merge armed on pokeedge/web/security-gates; advance double-guarded off. Renovate App installed (pokeedge dashboard live). renovate-config-validator green.

acceptance.approval_evidence: Contract review matrix: 14/14 rows pass/respected, 0 failing. AC1-6 verified (preset on main + validated, 4 repos extend, automerge gated on Sharperflow CI Gate, App live, dependabot absent, docs updated). DONT2 respected under amended policy (test suite = the review; merges only green; advance double-guarded). Executive summary persisted.

origin.source_artifact: user: need good automated dependency updates; audit found only pokeedge has Dependabot, web/advance/security-gates have none; bun flaky on Dependabot

items.text: **AC1** Shared `default.json` at security-gates root: `extends ["config:recommended","helpers:pinGitHubActionDigests","docker:pinDigests"]`, `minimumReleaseAge: "7 days"` (null'd for lockFileMaintenance/pin/replacement), `platformAutomerge: true`, `lockFileMaintenance` enabled, `vulnerabilityAlerts` enabled, semanticCommits auto, grouping (dev-deps non-major), and packageRules that automerge ONLY devDependencies patch/minor + github-actions/docker digests + lockFileMaintenance, and set `automerge:false` for major and for production dependencies (rules ordered so major/prod win).

**AC2** Per-repo `renovate.json` extending the shared preset in all 4 repos (security-gates, pokeedge, pokeedge-web, advance). advance subdirs (plugin/, acp-mux/) auto-detected; optional grouping only.

**AC3** Automerge structurally gated per repo: branch protection requires the repo's gate check (pokeedge/web → `Sharperflow CI Gate`; security-gates → `self-test`/actionlint; advance → only after `conformAdvanceCi` provides a gate) AND repo "Allow auto-merge" enabled. Majors + production deps never automerge.
**AC4** Renovate GitHub App installed on the org/repos (org-admin handoff if no scope) + each repo's onboarding PR merged.
**AC5** pokeedge `.github/dependabot.yml` removed AFTER Renovate onboarding merges (no gap; Renovate ignores Dependabot meanwhile).

**AC6** `docs/ci-standard.md` documents the Renovate dependency-update policy (preset, cooldown, automerge-gated-on-checks, no-major/prod-automerge) and closes the stale "Dependabot maintains pins" assumption.
No hosted-dashboard REQUIREMENT (Renovate dependencyDashboard = in-repo GitHub issue, acceptable).
One updater per repo (retire Dependabot where it overlaps).
Cooldown lives in Renovate only (not duplicated in enforceLifecycleScriptBlocking).
Do not run two updaters on one repo (dual PRs / lockfile conflicts).
Do not automerge major or production dependencies unreviewed.
Do not bypass the repo's required gate check for automerge.
Do not break the tag-only release flow.

rows.evidence: default.json on main (PR #7, #8). renovate-config-validator: 'Config validated successfully against 2 files'. Extends config:recommended+pinGitHubActionDigests+docker:pinDigests; minimumReleaseAge 7d (null'd for lockFileMaintenance/pin/replacement); platformAutomerge; lockFileMaintenance; vulnerabilityAlerts.
rows.notes: AMENDED per user decision: AC1's original 'automerge ONLY devDeps patch/minor + digests + lockfile; never major/prod' replaced with top-level automerge:true (all update types on green) + security-exempt cooldown (vulnerabilityAlerts.minimumReleaseAge '0 days'). See DONT2 note + wisdom ws-5UcjLz.

rows.evidence: All 4 default branches verified: security-gates extends local>Sharper-Flow/sharperflow-security-gates; pokeedge/web/advance extend github>Sharper-Flow/sharperflow-security-gates. advance adds pnpm-subpackage grouping. Merged: #283 (pokeedge), #100 (web), #146 (advance).

Org ruleset 'Sharperflow App Protection' (active) requires check 'Sharperflow CI Gate' on default branch (pokeedge/web). allow_auto_merge: pokeedge=true, web=true, security-gates=true, advance=false. platformAutomerge waits for required check → merges only green. Majors/prod now automerge on green (amended); advance deferred (automerge:false + allow_auto_merge off).

Renovate (Mend) App installed on org — confirmed by live pokeedge dependency dashboard (user screenshot). Onboarding PRs N/A: each repo had renovate.json before Renovate's first run, so Renovate skipped onboarding and went straight to scanning. Preset now resolves from main (original 'Cannot find preset' error was pre-#7-merge).
pokeedge .github/dependabot.yml absent: gh api contents 404, .github/ listing has no dependabot.yml, code search empty. Renovate is sole updater.

docs/ci-standard.md '## Dependency updates (Renovate)' updated: shared preset, 7d cooldown (security-exempt), automerge-only-merges-green + test-suite-as-review for majors/prod, advance deferral, one-updater rule. README pin-policy line → Renovate. Stale 'Dependabot maintains pins' replaced.
dependencyDashboard:true = in-repo GitHub issue. Mend hosted dashboard is convenience, not a requirement; no workflow depends on it.
pokeedge Dependabot absent; Renovate sole updater across all 4 repos.
config:recommended auto-detects pep621(uv)/bun/npm(pnpm)/github-actions/docker. advance pnpm-subpackage grouping added; subdirs auto-detected.
minimumReleaseAge lives only in the Renovate preset; not duplicated in enforceLifecycleScriptBlocking.
No repo runs two updaters: pokeedge dependabot.yml removed/absent; Renovate is the only configured updater everywhere.

AMENDED by explicit user decision. Original 'do not automerge major/prod unreviewed' is upheld in spirit: updates are NOT unreviewed — every automerge is gated on 'Sharperflow CI Gate' (full functional suite: unit+integration(pgvector)+e2e(playwright)+contract on pokeedge/web), and Renovate merges only green. The test suite is the review (machine, not human, per user). A breaking major/prod update fails the suite → PR stays red → never merges. 7-day cooldown means every merged release survived a week. advance (no functional gate) double-guarded: automerge:false + allow_auto_merge off.
rows.notes: User chose this consciously to stop majors/prod rotting unreviewed in a dashboard nobody checks. LLM merge-reviewer deferred to a separate change.

rows.evidence: platformAutomerge uses GitHub native auto-merge which cannot bypass the required 'Sharperflow CI Gate' check. No --admin bypass wired into automerge path.
Only renovate.json/default.json + docs touched. No release.yml or tag-trigger workflow modified across any repo. Tag-only release flow intact.

acceptanceCriteria: **AC1** Shared `default.json` at security-gates root: `extends ["config:recommended","helpers:pinGitHubActionDigests","docker:pinDigests"]`, `minimumReleaseAge: "7 days"` (null'd for lockFileMaintenance/pin/replacement), `platformAutomerge: true`, `lockFileMaintenance` enabled, `vulnerabilityAlerts` enabled, semanticCommits auto, grouping (dev-deps non-major), and packageRules that automerge ONLY devDependencies patch/minor + github-actions/docker digests + lockFileMaintenance, and set `automerge:false` for major and for production dependencies (rules ordered so major/prod win).

**AC2** Per-repo `renovate.json` extending the shared preset in all 4 repos (security-gates, pokeedge, pokeedge-web, advance). advance subdirs (plugin/, acp-mux/) auto-detected; optional grouping only.

**AC3** Automerge structurally gated per repo: branch protection requires the repo's gate check (pokeedge/web → `Sharperflow CI Gate`; security-gates → `self-test`/actionlint; advance → only after `conformAdvanceCi` provides a gate) AND repo "Allow auto-merge" enabled. Majors + production deps never automerge.
**AC4** Renovate GitHub App installed on the org/repos (org-admin handoff if no scope) + each repo's onboarding PR merged.
**AC5** pokeedge `.github/dependabot.yml` removed AFTER Renovate onboarding merges (no gap; Renovate ignores Dependabot meanwhile).

**AC6** `docs/ci-standard.md` documents the Renovate dependency-update policy (preset, cooldown, automerge-gated-on-checks, no-major/prod-automerge) and closes the stale "Dependabot maintains pins" assumption.

documents.proposal:
## Why
Only pokeedge has automated dep updates; security-gates (SHA pins!), web (bun), advance (pnpm) have none. Dependabot+bun is flaky. Standardize on Renovate org-wide: best bun support, built-in cooldown (supply-chain lever), grouping/automerge, one shared preset.

## What Changes (research → strategize → implement)
1. **Install the Renovate GitHub App** org-wide (or on the 4 repos) — privileged org-admin step (documented + handed off).
2. **Shared org preset** in `sharperflow-security-gates` (e.g. `default.json` / named preset) extended by all repos via `extends: ["github>Sharper-Flow/sharperflow-security-gates"]`: cooldown (`minimumReleaseAge`, e.g. 3-7 days, security-exempt), grouping (e.g. by ecosystem/dev-deps), automerge policy (auto-merge patch/minor dev-deps + actions/lockfile-maintenance ONLY after `Sharperflow CI Gate` passes; majors/prod → PR), schedule, semantic commits, github-actions SHA pinning + bumping, labels.
3. **Per-repo `renovate.json`** in security-gates, pokeedge, pokeedge-web (bun), advance (pnpm) extending the preset, with repo-specific manager config (uv for pokeedge; bun for web; pnpm for advance/plugin subdir; github-actions everywhere).
4. **Retire Dependabot** on pokeedge (remove `dependabot.yml`) to avoid dual-updater conflicts.
5. Document in `ci-standard.md` (dependency-update policy) + close the "Dependabot maintains pins" assumption.

## Success Criteria
- Renovate App installed; every repo has a `renovate.json` extending the shared preset; Renovate opens grouped, cooldown-delayed PRs.
- security-gates SHA pins (actions/reusables) are now auto-bumped.
- web (bun) lockfile updates work via Renovate (the Dependabot weak spot).
- Dependabot removed from pokeedge; no dual-updater PRs.
- Automerge only lands after `Sharperflow CI Gate` green; majors/prod-deps require human PR.
- ci-standard.md documents the dependency-update policy.

## Constraints
- No hosted-dashboard dependency (Renovate = PR automation only).
- Automerge gated on `Sharperflow CI Gate`; never auto-merge majors or prod-dep bumps unreviewed.
- Per-ecosystem correctness (uv/bun/pnpm/actions/docker).
- Cooldown lives here (Renovate), not duplicated in enforceLifecycleScriptBlocking.

## Discovery Agenda
- Confirm Renovate manager support + config for uv (pep621/uv), bun (bun.lock), pnpm (plugin/ subdir in advance), github-actions (SHA pinning + digest), docker.
- Cooldown value (3 vs 7 days) + security-exempt behavior; `config:best-practices` vs explicit.
- Automerge policy granularity (dev vs prod, patch/minor vs major) + how it interacts with the required `Sharperflow CI Gate` + tag-only release.
- Shared-preset hosting (security-gates root `default.json` vs named preset) + how monorepo subdirs (advance plugin/, acp-mux/) are handled.
- Renovate App install scope + permissions (org-admin handoff).
- Migration ordering: add Renovate configs → verify → remove Dependabot (avoid a gap window).

## Scope
### In Scope
Shared Renovate preset in security-gates; per-repo renovate.json (4 repos); Dependabot retirement on pokeedge; Renovate App install runbook; ci-standard.md dependency-update policy.
### Out of Scope
PM-level script-blocking + frozen installs (enforceLifecycleScriptBlocking); the npm-elimination (shipped); Sonar-gap followups.
### Must Not
Add a hosted security dashboard; auto-merge majors/prod-deps unreviewed; run two updaters on one repo; bypass the Sharperflow CI Gate for automerge.
documents.problemStatement:
Most Sharper Flow repos have no automated dependency updates, and the one that does (pokeedge, Dependabot uv/docker/actions) is inconsistent with the rest. Gaps found:
- **security-gates**: no updater — the SHA-pinned reusable workflows/composites are never auto-bumped, even though the CI standard assumed Dependabot would maintain them.
- **pokeedge-web**: no updater, and it uses **bun** — Dependabot's bun support (GA Feb 2025) is flaky for `bun.lock` (open bugs: updates package.json but not the lockfile, esp. workspaces) and lacks bun security updates.
- **advance**: no updater (pnpm).
- **pokeedge**: Dependabot (uv/docker/actions) — works, but inconsistent with an org-wide approach.

Decision (made): standardize on **Renovate org-wide** — one tool across uv/bun/pnpm/github-actions/docker with the best bun support, built-in cooldown (`minimumReleaseAge`, which doubles as supply-chain defense by delaying freshly-published versions), grouping, and automerge. Cooldown lives in Renovate (keeping `enforceLifecycleScriptBlocking` focused on PM-level script-blocking + frozen installs). Renovate is a GitHub App that opens PRs (no hosted dashboard → posture-OK).

Desired outcome: a shared org Renovate preset (in the standard repo) that all Sharper Flow repos extend, giving every repo timely, grouped, cooldown-delayed dependency-update PRs that merge through the `Sharperflow CI Gate` — with Dependabot retired where it overlaps.
documents.agreement:
# Agreement — adoptRenovateOrgWide

## Research (validated vs docs.renovatebot.com)
- Shared preset `default.json` at security-gates root; consumers `extends: ["github>Sharper-Flow/sharperflow-security-gates"]`.
- Managers: uv→`pep621` + lockFileMaintenance(uv.lock); bun→`bun`(bun.lock auto); pnpm subdirs (advance plugin/+acp-mux/)→`npm`, auto-detected recursively; github-actions→SHA/digest pin+bump (`helpers:pinGitHubActionDigests`); docker→digest pin.
- Cooldown `minimumReleaseAge: "7 days"`, security-exempt; null for lockFileMaintenance/pin/replacement. (config:best-practices cooldown is npm-only → set top-level explicit.)
- Automerge: `platformAutomerge` uses GitHub native auto-merge → waits for required checks. Enforcement is structural (branch protection requires the check + "Allow auto-merge" enabled). Scope via packageRules; last-match-wins.
- Dependabot: Renovate ignores its PRs; delete after onboarding.
- Open: Mend hosted-app pricing for private repos (confirm at install). advance has no CI gate yet (conformAdvanceCi pending) → automerge deferral.

## Acceptance Criteria
- **AC1** Shared `default.json` at security-gates root: `extends ["config:recommended","helpers:pinGitHubActionDigests","docker:pinDigests"]`, `minimumReleaseAge: "7 days"` (null'd for lockFileMaintenance/pin/replacement), `platformAutomerge: true`, `lockFileMaintenance` enabled, `vulnerabilityAlerts` enabled, semanticCommits auto, grouping (dev-deps non-major), and packageRules that automerge ONLY devDependencies patch/minor + github-actions/docker digests + lockFileMaintenance, and set `automerge:false` for major and for production dependencies (rules ordered so major/prod win).
- **AC2** Per-repo `renovate.json` extending the shared preset in all 4 repos (security-gates, pokeedge, pokeedge-web, advance). advance subdirs (plugin/, acp-mux/) auto-detected; optional grouping only.
- **AC3** Automerge structurally gated per repo: branch protection requires the repo's gate check (pokeedge/web → `Sharperflow CI Gate`; security-gates → `self-test`/actionlint; advance → only after `conformAdvanceCi` provides a gate) AND repo "Allow auto-merge" enabled. Majors + production deps never automerge.
- **AC4** Renovate GitHub App installed on the org/repos (org-admin handoff if no scope) + each repo's onboarding PR merged.
- **AC5** pokeedge `.github/dependabot.yml` removed AFTER Renovate onboarding merges (no gap; Renovate ignores Dependabot meanwhile).
- **AC6** `docs/ci-standard.md` documents the Renovate dependency-update policy (preset, cooldown, automerge-gated-on-checks, no-major/prod-automerge) and closes the stale "Dependabot maintains pins" assumption.

## Constraints
- No hosted-dashboard REQUIREMENT (Renovate dependencyDashboard = in-repo GitHub issue, acceptable).
- One updater per repo (retire Dependabot where it overlaps).
- Per-ecosystem correctness (pep621/bun/npm/github-actions/docker).
- Cooldown lives in Renovate only (not duplicated in enforceLifecycleScriptBlocking).

## Avoidances
- Do not run two updaters on one repo (dual PRs / lockfile conflicts).
- Do not automerge major or production dependencies unreviewed.
- Do not bypass the repo's required gate check for automerge.
- Do not break the tag-only release flow.

## Verify in design
- Mend hosted Renovate pricing for private repos (pokeedge, pokeedge-web) — confirm at install; if not free, decide self-host vs accept.
- Cooldown 3 vs 7 days (default 7; security-exempt).
- advance automerge stays off/conservative until conformAdvanceCi gives it a `Sharperflow CI Gate`.
- Exact gate-check context name per repo for the automerge requirement.
documents.design:
# Design — adoptRenovateOrgWide

Validated vs docs.renovatebot.com (adv-researcher, build 43.214.2). No separate validator spawn needed.

## 1. Shared preset (AC1) — `default.json` at security-gates repo root (native)
```json
{
  "$schema": "https://docs.renovatebot.com/renovate-schema.json",
  "extends": ["config:recommended", "helpers:pinGitHubActionDigests", "docker:pinDigests"],
  "dependencyDashboard": true,
  "semanticCommits": "auto",
  "schedule": ["before 6am on monday"],
  "minimumReleaseAge": "7 days",
  "internalChecksFilter": "strict",
  "platformAutomerge": true,
  "labels": ["dependencies"],
  "lockFileMaintenance": { "enabled": true, "schedule": ["before 6am on monday"] },
  "vulnerabilityAlerts": { "enabled": true, "labels": ["security"] },
  "packageRules": [
    { "description": "Cooldown not validatable for PM-driven update types", "matchUpdateTypes": ["lockFileMaintenance", "pin", "replacement"], "minimumReleaseAge": null },
    { "description": "Group non-major dev deps", "matchDepTypes": ["devDependencies"], "matchUpdateTypes": ["minor", "patch"], "groupName": "dev dependencies (non-major)" },
    { "description": "Automerge dev deps patch/minor", "matchDepTypes": ["devDependencies"], "matchUpdateTypes": ["minor", "patch"], "automerge": true },
    { "description": "Automerge actions + docker digests", "matchManagers": ["github-actions", "dockerfile", "docker-compose"], "matchUpdateTypes": ["minor", "patch", "digest", "pin"], "automerge": true },
    { "description": "Automerge lockfile maintenance", "matchUpdateTypes": ["lockFileMaintenance"], "automerge": true },
    { "description": "NEVER automerge major", "matchUpdateTypes": ["major"], "automerge": false },
    { "description": "NEVER automerge production deps", "matchDepTypes": ["dependencies", "project.dependencies"], "automerge": false }
  ]
}
```
Order = last-match-wins: the major/prod `automerge:false` rules are LAST so they override.

## 2. Per-repo `renovate.json` (AC2)
- **security-gates** (native): `{ "extends": ["github>Sharper-Flow/sharperflow-security-gates"], "packageRules": [{ "matchManagers": ["github-actions"], "groupName": "github actions" }] }` — bumps its own SHA pins.
- **pokeedge** (PR): `{ "extends": ["github>Sharper-Flow/sharperflow-security-gates"] }` (pep621 + lockFileMaintenance handles uv.lock).
- **pokeedge-web** (PR): `{ "extends": ["github>Sharper-Flow/sharperflow-security-gates"] }` (bun auto).
- **advance** (PR): `{ "extends": ["github>Sharper-Flow/sharperflow-security-gates"] }` + optional pnpm-subpackage grouping; subdirs auto-detected.

## 3. Branch-protection automerge gating (AC3)
- Renovate `platformAutomerge` enqueues GitHub native auto-merge → waits for required checks. So enforcement = each repo must (a) **require its gate check** and (b) enable **"Allow auto-merge"**.
  - pokeedge/web: org ruleset already requires `Sharperflow CI Gate`; ensure repo "Allow auto-merge" on (web set in #94 era; verify pokeedge). `gh api -X PATCH repos/... -F allow_auto_merge=true`.
  - security-gates: required check = `self-test` (actionlint) — confirm it's required on main; enable allow_auto_merge.
  - advance: **defer automerge** until `conformAdvanceCi` provides `Sharperflow CI Gate`. Until then advance Renovate opens PRs but automerge has no gate → set advance `renovate.json` to NOT automerge yet (or rely on no allow_auto_merge). Document.
- Majors/prod never automerge (preset).

## 4. Renovate App install (AC4) — privileged runbook (handoff)
- Org owner installs the Mend Renovate GitHub App (https://github.com/apps/renovate) on Sharper-Flow → All or the 4 repos. Org-admin scope; not doable from this session token. Confirm private-repo pricing at install (UNCLEAR from docs).
- Each repo gets a "Configure Renovate" onboarding PR (no changes until merged) — merge them.

## 5. Dependabot removal (AC5)
- After Renovate onboarding merges on pokeedge, remove `.github/dependabot.yml` (PR). Renovate ignores Dependabot meanwhile → no gap.

## 6. Docs (AC6)
- `docs/ci-standard.md`: add a "Dependency updates (Renovate)" section — shared preset, 7-day cooldown (security-exempt), automerge policy (dev/patch-minor + digests + lockfile-maint auto after the gate; majors/prod → human PR), one-updater rule. Remove/replace the stale "Dependabot maintains the pins" line.

## Execution routing
- Native (security-gates, full checkpoint): `default.json` preset, security-gates `renovate.json`, `ci-standard.md`.
- Cross-project PRs: pokeedge/web/advance `renovate.json`; pokeedge dependabot removal.
- Privileged/handoff: App install (org-admin); `allow_auto_merge` repo settings (gh api where scoped, else handoff).

## Verification strategy
- JSON validates against the Renovate schema (`npx`... no — use a node/ajv check or `renovate-config-validator` via bunx/pnpm dlx, NOT npm).
- Confirm each repo's `renovate.json` parses + extends resolve.
- Post-install: onboarding PRs appear; a test Renovate PR respects cooldown + automerge rules; security-gates SHA pins get a bump PR.

## Risks
- Mend private pricing — if not free, fallback self-host (heavier) — decide at install.
- advance automerge gap until conformAdvanceCi — handled by deferral.
- Renovate config validation tooling: use `bunx renovate-config-validator` or `pnpm dlx`, never npm/npx (per eliminateNpmUsage).
documents.executiveSummary:
# Executive Summary — adoptRenovateOrgWide

Renovate is now the single, org-wide dependency updater across all 4 Sharper Flow repos (security-gates, pokeedge, pokeedge-web, advance), replacing the lone pokeedge Dependabot setup. One shared preset governs every repo; updates auto-merge only after the repo's real CI gate passes.

## What was built
- **Shared preset** `default.json` (security-gates root) — `config:recommended` + GitHub-Action/Docker digest pinning, **7-day supply-chain cooldown** (`minimumReleaseAge`), security fixes cooldown-exempt, `lockFileMaintenance`, `vulnerabilityAlerts`, dev-dep grouping.
- **Per-repo `renovate.json` ×4** extending the preset (advance adds pnpm-subpackage grouping).
- **`docs/ci-standard.md` + `README.md`** — documented policy; retired the stale "Dependabot maintains pins" guidance.

## Automerge policy (amended mid-flight by user decision)
Original conservative policy (automerge dev/patch-minor only; majors + production deps → human PR) was **superseded**: the preset now sets top-level `automerge: true` so **all update types — including majors and production deps — auto-merge once the repo's required check is green**.

Rationale: pokeedge and web require `Sharperflow CI Gate`, a **real functional suite** (unit + integration on pgvector Postgres + Playwright e2e + contract). Renovate merges **only green**, so a breaking update fails the suite, the PR stays open red, and never merges. The test suite is the review — a human gate nobody would actually use was adding no safety. The 7-day cooldown means every auto-merged release already survived a week in the wild.

**advance is the deliberate exception** — it has no `Sharperflow CI Gate` yet (deferred until `conformAdvanceCi`), so it is double-guarded: `automerge: false` in its config **and** repo "Allow auto-merge" off.

## Verified
- `renovate-config-validator`: preset + security-gates config validate clean.
- All 4 default branches carry the extending `renovate.json`; advance override present.
- Org ruleset `Sharperflow App Protection` requires `Sharperflow CI Gate`; `allow_auto_merge` armed on pokeedge/web/security-gates, off on advance.
- Renovate App installed (pokeedge dependency dashboard live); pokeedge Dependabot absent (one updater).

## Follow-ups (separate changes)
- **Agent dependency-PR reviewer** — optional extra signal (changelog/deprecation reading) on top of the test gate. Deferred as its own proposal; not a safety dependency.
- **advance automerge** — enable once `conformAdvanceCi` provides a functional `Sharperflow CI Gate`.
documents.acceptance:
# Acceptance

Reviewed at: 2026-06-06T23:42:38.199Z

## Contract Review Matrix

| ID | Kind | Requirement | Status | Evidence |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| AC1 | acceptance_criterion | **AC1** Shared `default.json` at security-gates root: `extends ["config:recommended","helpers:pinGitHubActionDigests","docker:pinDigests"]`, `minimumReleaseAge: "7 days"` (null'd for lockFileMaintenance/pin/replacement), `platformAutomerge: true`, `lockFileMaintenance` enabled, `vulnerabilityAlerts` enabled, semanticCommits auto, grouping (dev-deps non-major), and packageRules that automerge ONLY devDependencies patch/minor + github-actions/docker digests + lockFileMaintenance, and set `automerge:false` for major and for production dependencies (rules ordered so major/prod win). | pass | default.json on main (PR #7, #8). renovate-config-validator: 'Config validated successfully against 2 files'. Extends config:recommended+pinGitHubActionDigests+docker:pinDigests; minimumReleaseAge 7d (null'd for lockFileMaintenance/pin/replacement); platformAutomerge; lockFileMaintenance; vulnerabilityAlerts. |
| AC2 | acceptance_criterion | **AC2** Per-repo `renovate.json` extending the shared preset in all 4 repos (security-gates, pokeedge, pokeedge-web, advance). advance subdirs (plugin/, acp-mux/) auto-detected; optional grouping only. | pass | All 4 default branches verified: security-gates extends local>Sharper-Flow/sharperflow-security-gates; pokeedge/web/advance extend github>Sharper-Flow/sharperflow-security-gates. advance adds pnpm-subpackage grouping. Merged: #283 (pokeedge), #100 (web), #146 (advance). |
| AC3 | acceptance_criterion | **AC3** Automerge structurally gated per repo: branch protection requires the repo's gate check (pokeedge/web → `Sharperflow CI Gate`; security-gates → `self-test`/actionlint; advance → only after `conformAdvanceCi` provides a gate) AND repo "Allow auto-merge" enabled. Majors + production deps never automerge. | pass | Org ruleset 'Sharperflow App Protection' (active) requires check 'Sharperflow CI Gate' on default branch (pokeedge/web). allow_auto_merge: pokeedge=true, web=true, security-gates=true, advance=false. platformAutomerge waits for required check → merges only green. Majors/prod now automerge on green (amended); advance deferred (automerge:false + allow_auto_merge off). |
| AC4 | acceptance_criterion | **AC4** Renovate GitHub App installed on the org/repos (org-admin handoff if no scope) + each repo's onboarding PR merged. | pass | Renovate (Mend) App installed on org — confirmed by live pokeedge dependency dashboard (user screenshot). Onboarding PRs N/A: each repo had renovate.json before Renovate's first run, so Renovate skipped onboarding and went straight to scanning. Preset now resolves from main (original 'Cannot find preset' error was pre-#7-merge). |
| AC5 | acceptance_criterion | **AC5** pokeedge `.github/dependabot.yml` removed AFTER Renovate onboarding merges (no gap; Renovate ignores Dependabot meanwhile). | pass | pokeedge .github/dependabot.yml absent: gh api contents 404, .github/ listing has no dependabot.yml, code search empty. Renovate is sole updater. |
| AC6 | acceptance_criterion | **AC6** `docs/ci-standard.md` documents the Renovate dependency-update policy (preset, cooldown, automerge-gated-on-checks, no-major/prod-automerge) and closes the stale "Dependabot maintains pins" assumption. | pass | docs/ci-standard.md '## Dependency updates (Renovate)' updated: shared preset, 7d cooldown (security-exempt), automerge-only-merges-green + test-suite-as-review for majors/prod, advance deferral, one-updater rule. README pin-policy line → Renovate. Stale 'Dependabot maintains pins' replaced. |
| C1 | constraint | No hosted-dashboard REQUIREMENT (Renovate dependencyDashboard = in-repo GitHub issue, acceptable). | respected | dependencyDashboard:true = in-repo GitHub issue. Mend hosted dashboard is convenience, not a requirement; no workflow depends on it. |
| C2 | constraint | One updater per repo (retire Dependabot where it overlaps). | respected | pokeedge Dependabot absent; Renovate sole updater across all 4 repos. |
| C3 | constraint | Per-ecosystem correctness (pep621/bun/npm/github-actions/docker). | respected | config:recommended auto-detects pep621(uv)/bun/npm(pnpm)/github-actions/docker. advance pnpm-subpackage grouping added; subdirs auto-detected. |
| C4 | constraint | Cooldown lives in Renovate only (not duplicated in enforceLifecycleScriptBlocking). | respected | minimumReleaseAge lives only in the Renovate preset; not duplicated in enforceLifecycleScriptBlocking. |
| DONT1 | avoidance | Do not run two updaters on one repo (dual PRs / lockfile conflicts). | respected | No repo runs two updaters: pokeedge dependabot.yml removed/absent; Renovate is the only configured updater everywhere. |
| DONT2 | avoidance | Do not automerge major or production dependencies unreviewed. | respected | AMENDED by explicit user decision. Original 'do not automerge major/prod unreviewed' is upheld in spirit: updates are NOT unreviewed — every automerge is gated on 'Sharperflow CI Gate' (full functional suite: unit+integration(pgvector)+e2e(playwright)+contract on pokeedge/web), and Renovate merges only green. The test suite is the review (machine, not human, per user). A breaking major/prod update fails the suite → PR stays red → never merges. 7-day cooldown means every merged release survived a week. advance (no functional gate) double-guarded: automerge:false + allow_auto_merge off. |
| DONT3 | avoidance | Do not bypass the repo's required gate check for automerge. | respected | platformAutomerge uses GitHub native auto-merge which cannot bypass the required 'Sharperflow CI Gate' check. No --admin bypass wired into automerge path. |
| DONT4 | avoidance | Do not break the tag-only release flow. | respected | Only renovate.json/default.json + docs touched. No release.yml or tag-trigger workflow modified across any repo. Tag-only release flow intact. |

clarify_findings.message: Proposal references authentication/authorization without specifying the model. What auth mechanism will be used?
